Uses of Interface
cli.FlagHandler

    • Uses of FlagHandler in cli

      Classes in cli that implement FlagHandler 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LongFlagHandler
      Provides a concrete strategy for processing long-form flags based on GNU conventions.
      class  ShortFlagHandler
      Provides a concrete strategy for processing short-form flags based on POSIX conventions.
      Fields in cli declared as FlagHandler 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private FlagHandler CommandFlagParser.longHandler 
      private FlagHandler CommandFlagParser.shortHandler
